name: Carrot Cake Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 3/4 cups Sifted cake flour (or 1 1/2-cups all-purpose Flour, sifted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sifted flour, cinnamon, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
2. Sift together and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and olive oil and beat with an electric mixer at medium speed for about 2 minutes, or until smooth and well blended.
4. Fold in grated carrots with their juice. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts. Add the dry ingredients and mix well.
6. Grease and dust two 9-inch cake pans with flour.
7. Pour in batter and bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 55-60 minutes.
8. Serve warm. Can be wrapped and stored in refrigerator for up to one week, which improves flavor and makes the cake bread more moist.
9. Bread can be iced with powdered sugar, orange juice, and creamed butter mixture.
